markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the new technical QA process for DevRel documents.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Process:** Make direct technical edits using Google Docs' "Track Changes" feature.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This eliminates a manual step for editors, streamlining the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Focus:** QA is strictly for technical accuracy (e.g., code, workflows), not editorial style or links.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [**Action:** Segun will re-edit prior work by EOD tomorrow and complete 5 new articles by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Inefficient QA Workflow

  - [The previous QA process was inefficient, requiring editors to manually implement suggested changes from comments.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [This created unnecessary work and slowed the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Solution: Direct Technical Edits

  - [The new process requires direct edits in Google Docs using "Track Changes."](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [**Procedure:**](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
    1.  [**Make the edit directly** in the document.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
    2.  [**Add a comment** explaining the rationale for the change.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [**Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [**Focus:** Technical accuracy for a developer audience (e.g., code, workflows, specs).](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [**Out of Scope:** Editorial style, internal links, or non-technical content (e.g., app registration steps).](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Segun:**](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Re-edit all prior QA work using the new process (due EOD tomorrow).](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Submit the first re-edited article for review before continuing.](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [Complete 5 new articles (due early next week).](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Najam:**](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [Assign 5 new articles to Segun (by EOD today or tomorrow).](https://fathom.video/share/z1ZxS6DtGvjp78Uz-N4uxaRFn7SVRkLr?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
